steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no dependencies and is ready to start.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure for paper assets, logs, research, plan, and results.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review any existing papers in the corpus relevant to entity-aware STT and contextual biasing.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search arXiv, Semantic Scholar, ACL Anthology, ICASSP, and Interspeech 2026 for papers on contextual biasing, shallow fusion, entity-aware ASR, and LLM post-correction.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review assets and outputs from t0001_stt_benchmark for domain context (gold-92 benchmark schema, entity categories).

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan which discovered papers to add as assets, assign categories, define synthesis document structure.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Add 8-15 paper assets using /add-paper and /download_paper; write synthesis results_summary.md and search_log.md.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up task suggestions based on literature findings and shortlisted techniques.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture session transcripts, set task status to completed.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Not needed — no GPU compute required for literature survey.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Not in literature-survey optional_steps; not applicable for this task type.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Not applicable — this task is the literature survey itself; no quantitative results to compare against published baselines.
